'''Liegeus Sarpaetius Vorn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from a wealthy family. He became a producer of fake [[Hologram/Legends|holograms]] and entered into an arrangement with [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]]. He later helped the kidnapped [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] escape from Ashgad's clutches, and was in turn rescued from him by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

==Biography==
===As a holo faker===
The black sheep of his family, Vorn became a [[holo faker]], stealing people's ideas and passing them off as his own. He was quite talented, able to cobble together extremely realistic [[Holovid/Legends|holovids]] from a database of holograms he kept. This database contained recordings of countless backgrounds, faces, animals, pieces of furniture, sounds, and motions.

Vorn once spent time on [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]] ghost-writing love [[Gamorrean poetry|poems]] for [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] bachelors for use while courting.

Early in his career, Vorn had an affair with a young [[Natasi Daala]]. This affair would end when Daala was transferred to the [[Maw Installation]], though they would meet again years later after the battle of Endor.

===Involvement with Seti Ashgad===
Vorn eventually fell in with Seti Ashgad and the [[Droch/Legends|droch]] [[Dzym]] on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]]. After Ashgad kidnapped [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], Vorn kept suspicion away via his holo forgeries, giving the rest of the galaxy the appearance that everything was normal. During this time, Vorn posed as Ashgad's personal pilot. Vorn also programmed the computer core of Dzym's flagship, the [[Reliant (I-7 Howlrunner)|''Reliant'']].

While working for Seti Ashgad, Vorn was forced by [[Beldorion]] to edit the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] collection of Huttese [[pornography]].

Vorn befriended Leia, providing her with pure water in place of the drugged water Ashgad provided, and eventually helped her escape. Dzym and Ashgad were not pleased, and punished him. Vorn was later rescued by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and brought to a [[Newcomer]] camp.

When Admiral Daala arrived on the planet along with [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] personnel, Vorn was reunited with his former lover. He and Daala left for [[Pedducis Chorios]]. They spent some time at her residence there before departing for the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]], where Daala planned to rebuild [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. The pair married, and had a [[Natasi Daala's son|son]].

===Later life===
Vorn was killed in [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]] by a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] as part of a [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]] plot to assassinate Daala.<ref name="Revelation" />
